import json, sys
with open\(''mmcad_training_colab.ipynb'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
cells = nb[''cells'']
print\(f''Total cells: {len\(cells\)}''\)
for i, cell in enumerate\(cells\):
    src = ''''.join\(cell[''source''][:3]\)[:150]
    print\(f''Cell {i} \({cell[""cell_type""]}\): {src.strip\(\)[:150]}''\)
")

import json
with open\(''mmcad_training_colab.ipynb'', encoding=''utf-8''\) as f:
    nb = json.load\(f\)
cells = nb[''cells'']
print\(f''Total cells: {len\(cells\)}''\)
